expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体板材规格。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total measurement, [BoardThick] is the thickness of the top, bottom, and side boards, and [BackBoardThick] is the thickness of the back board.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi, dan [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, dan [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดบอร์ดสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของบอร์ดด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง และ [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของบอร์ดด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày của ván trên, ván dưới và hai bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga laki ng board para sa isang cabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ang kapal ng itaas, ibaba, at gilid na mga board, at ang [BackBoardThick] ang kapal ng likod na board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အကြွားအရွေ့အတွက် ဘုတ်အဖွဲ့အရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်ပါသင့်မည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်၊ အောက်နှင့် ဘေးဘုတ်အထူဖြစ်ပြီး [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘုတ်အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា kích thước សម្រាប់ក្រុមបណ្តុំ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth]្នាជាសចារឹក [BoardThick] [BackBoardThick] [BackBoardThick]. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ນື່າທີ່ສ່ວນສ້າງໃນຄອດເຄົາດນຈູ [Revised TR language lao capsule]
